parents.subject: LU-18851 tests: fix nodelist in sanity/170b

commit.subject: LU-18986 mgc: target registration buffer check
commit.message:
LU-18986 mgc: target registration buffer check

Don't allow request buffer overflow which can be
result of many NIDs in mti_nidlist[]

Patch calculates how many NIDs can fit and allows
only those what fit in buffer.

Patch removes also need in NID list in reply as that
is not required.

Signed-off-by: Mikhail Pershin <mpershin@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I3a2eee414b8398632a0730b332ae5a7f1b62f8ec
